project_type: Android Kotlin app using Jetpack Compose, Retrofit, Gson
build_system: Gradle with Kotlin DSL, Java 17 required
test_framework: JUnit 4 + Compose UI testing (minimal tests present)
verification_instructions: Run assembleDebug to verify the app compiles without errors after model changes
setup_instructions: Set JAVA_HOME to /root/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2, ensure Android SDK available
environment_constraints: No Android emulator available for runtime testing. Validation is compile-only via assembleDebug.
contribution_requirements: None documented - working on feature branch feature/android-mystic-nusa-app
key_patterns: Models use @SerializedName for JSON mapping with Gson. Repositories return Result<T>. ViewModels expose StateFlow<UiState>. API calls go through RetrofitInstance singleton with auth interceptor. Base URL: https://mystical-nusa.web.id/api/
directory_structure: MysticNusa/app/src/main/java/com/mysticnusa/app/ contains: data/models/ (data classes for API), data/remote/ (Retrofit ApiService + RetrofitInstance), data/repository/ (repositories wrapping API calls), data/local/ (TokenManager), ui/viewmodels/ (ViewModels with StateFlow), ui/screens/ (Compose screens)
